vulnerability.reason: The condition of creative professionals assuming accurate retrieval and being unable to detect silent granularity mismatches is semantically present as reliance on opaque AI abstractions without detection means.

dose_response.reason: The causal arc of amplification leading to unresolved mismatches and inaccurate retrievals is present, but it terminates at resource waste/degradation/disruption, omitting the downstream dissatisfaction and rejection of AI tools that are part of the reference's causal chain.
dose_response.reference: Plug-and-play visual abstraction amplifies granularity mismatches, which in interactive cross-modal retrieval go unresolved, exposing creative professionals to inaccurate results, causing lowered productivity, dissatisfaction, and rejection of AI tools.
